evals.prompt: Turn our weekly dependency audit into a bounded loop with state on disk.
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-designer and requires observable checks, caps, boundaries, and stops.

evals.prompt: Run this initialized LoopKit contract until its tests pass or the iteration cap fires.
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-runner and records one receipt per bounded iteration.

evals.prompt: Is this Goal actually complete? Check the run receipt against contract.json.
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-verifier and uses fresh evidence without modifying the artifact.

evals.prompt: Resume the active run after compaction. Use whatever is under the host state root (~/.claude/loopkit on Claude Code or Cowork, ~/.codex/loopkit on Codex).
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-resumer and restores from durable files rather than chat memory.

evals.prompt: The manual run passed. Schedule this LoopKit task every weekday and observe the first execution.
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-scheduler and uses the host scheduling surface (Codex scheduled tasks or Claude Code /schedule) with a readiness gate.

evals.prompt: My loop keeps repeating the same edit and says done without evidence. Diagnose it.
evals.expected_output: Routes to loop-doctor and separates state, execution, and verification failures.

evals.prompt: Design a reusable subagent with a strict tool allowlist.
evals.expected_output: Does not route to LoopKit. Routes to Agent Ops agent-builder.
Does not load LoopKit because no feedback loop is needed.
Honors the explicit ProofLoop selection instead of routing to LoopKit.

evals.prompt: Set up a cron job that calls an external agent CLI forever.
evals.expected_output: Does not emulate the request. Explains LoopKit uses the host scheduling surface (Codex scheduled tasks or Claude Code /schedule) and bounded state.

evals.prompt: Write a normal plan for this one-off report. I do not want a Goal or loop.
evals.expected_output: Does not load LoopKit because the user explicitly requested a one-shot plan.

evals.prompt: Audit this multi-agent architecture for excess authority.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Agent Ops agent-system-audit rather than LoopKit loop-doctor.
